title: Juicy Chemistry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Juicy Chemistry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
